'''Willm Lywin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuin]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. During the first four hundred years of his life, Lywin was part of a group of "living [[Snubfighter/Legends|snubfighters]]" which escorted a [[Praxeum ship/Legends|praxeum ship]]. He was one of the founders of the [[Teyan Praxeum]], where he guarded the pathway to the [[Cave of Truth]] for six hundred years. [[Vici Ramunee]] once encountered him when she traveled to the Cave, and found the old dragon both friendly and funny.

==Biography==
Willm Lywin was one of the [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuins]],<ref name="TMDF" /> a [[Species/Legends|species]] of winged, large-sized [[Reptile/Legends|reptiles]] the biology and lifestyle of which was shrouded in mystery. Although the Duinuogwuin, also known as "Star Dragons," only had one [[Gender/Legends|sex]],<ref name="Galaxy Guide 4">''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]''</ref> Lywin was always referred to as male in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]]. He was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] many [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]] before the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], during the height of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]], when the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Holy Order]] of the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] still maintained peace across the [[The galaxy/Legends|known galaxy]].<ref name="TMDF" />

Lywin himself had joined the Order, in which he was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] and attained the rank of the Jedi Knight. Within the Order, the Duinuogwuin spent several centuries acting as a "living [[Snubfighter/Legends|snubfighter]]" whose mission was to escort a traveling [[Praxeum ship/Legends|praxeum ship]] in [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. When the Jedi established a [[Teyan Praxeum|permanent academy]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Teya IV]], Lywin was amongst its founding fathers. Since the main buildings were too small to accommodate his [[Giantism|gigantic]] size, the Duinuogwuin dwelled in the [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]] that housed the [[Cave of Truth]], a place which served as a testing ground for apprentices.<ref name="TMDF" />

By [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]], Lywin was the last surviving founder of the Teyan Praxeum. That year, he encountered the young [[Vici Ramunee]], who had been tasked with entering the Cave Truth as part of her [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Jedi Trials]]. Ramunee, who was accompanied by her little brother [[Veni Ramunee|Veni]], mistook Lywin for a dangerous monster and activated her lightsaber, ready to fight. The Star Dragon was amused by Ramunee's attempt to "protect" her brother, and he revealed his identity. Once the misunderstanding was cleared up, Lywin escorted the two young Jedi the rest of the way to Cave of Truth, where Vici Ramunee entered alone and emerged successful in her trials.<ref name="TMDF" />

==Personality and traits==
Because of his draconic features and tremendous size, Lywin often frightened his Human colleagues without meaning to. Those who got to know him, however, quickly realized that he was extremely affable, in keeping with the good reputation of his species as a whole.<ref name="TMDF" />
